violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani Bucket found at 500ppm Quat. *Maintain sanitizer at 200-400ppm per label instructions. -Wiping cloth left at counter of espresso machine for unknown time, not stored in sanitizer between uses.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Cloth curtains being used to cover storage below service counters. -Edges of particle board shelves below service counters are unsealed.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface used with potentially hazardous food was not cleaned every four hours while in use or as frequently as required. -Utensils and pitcher are rinsed throughout day but only receive full wash, rinse and sanitize at end of day.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Ice machine appears to have an air break NOT an Air Gap.
Handwashing lavatories. — ---Barista hand sink does not have a splash guard between the hand sink basin and the ice bin.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. -Paper towel dispensers are not available at either hand sink. *Tri-fold paper towels are currently stored loose at shelf above Barista hand sink and loose at side counter of kitchen hand sink.

Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room used by women did not contain at least one covered waste receptacle. -Neither restroom have covered trash cans.--Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. -Neither restroom door self-closes.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. -Staff personal food items stored on top shelf in refrigerator above food service items. *Ensure personal items are stored below and separate from any food service items.
